---
title: "About"
---

Hi, I'm Theresa Louise Binnings - a biology student completing my degree in Ecology, Evolution, and Organismal Biology with a minor in Data Science at CSUMB, and a strong foundation in chemistry, mathematics, and writing. My love of plants initially brought me back to school — but my path widened and grew to include the study of chemistry, biology, and mathematics — enabling me to explore working in the classroom as a supplementary instructor and teacher’s assistant for STEM courses.

```         
```
